items.placeName: Origin 1982 - Speakeasy bar in The last old house (1982)

facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this bar. That old house at 149 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo? That's Origin 1982. A speakeasy inside a 1982 building that somehow has 617 reviews and a 4.9 rating. Order something. Sit in the dim light. Wonder how you almost missed it. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Push open the door of The last old house. Cocktails, low light, zero tourists. Origin 1982 is the bar locals aren't sharing. 4.9 stars. 617 reviews. Now you know.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about Origin 1982. A speakeasy inside a house built in 1982. 4.9 stars. 617 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Step inside The last old house. Speakeasy vibes, 4.9 stars, and zero crowds. Origin 1982 just became your Phu Quoc night plan.

tiktok.caption: The bar locals keep to themselves. Origin 1982 on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.9 stars. Don't walk past it. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocNightlife #VietnamTravel

items.placeName: The Cheeky Traveller English Pub & Bar

facebook.caption: POV: you ducked into a back alley off Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and found a proper English pub in Phu Quoc. Cold pints. Darts. Regulars who actually talk to you. The Cheeky Traveller is rated 4.8 stars across 885 reviews and it shows. No pretense, no overpriced cocktail list. Just a great bar doing exactly what it promises. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Hẻm 118, Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Walk in. Cold pint lands on the bar. 885 people gave The Cheeky Traveller 4.8 stars. You'll get it immediately.

instagram.caption: POV: you found a real English pub in Phu Quoc. 4.8★, 885 reviews. The Cheeky Traveller delivers. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Cold pint. Back alley. 4.8 stars. The Cheeky Traveller hits every time.

tiktok.caption: Found a proper English pub in Phu Quoc and it's rated 4.8★ 😤 #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocBars #TravelTips

items.placeName: Rosso Sky Bar & Lounge | Night Club

facebook.caption: Phu Quoc nightlife that actually delivers. Rosso Sky Bar & Lounge sits above Duong Dong and the vibe shifts the moment you step in. Cocktails, beats, crowd that knows how to have a night. 4.3 stars across 79 reviews tells you this isn't a one-time fluke. Skip the beach bar scene. Come up here instead. Tag your travel buddy.
facebook.video_caption: Rooftop. Bass dropping. Duong Dong lit up below you. This is Rosso Sky Bar on a Phu Quoc night and it goes hard.

instagram.caption: Phu Quoc nights hit different up here. Rosso Sky Bar, Duong Dong. 4.3 stars, 79 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Rooftop bar. Phu Quoc after dark. Rosso Sky Bar is the move tonight.

tiktok.caption: Phu Quoc rooftop bar energy is real at Rosso Sky Bar. Don't sleep on it. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocNightlife #VietnamTravel #TravelReels

Wide shot: Duong Dong glowing below

Crowd dancing, colored lights sweeping
Guest looking out over the city lights

facebook.caption: Some nights in Phu Quoc just hit different. Shisha Bar Phu Quoc on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is one of those places where the playlist is right, the smoke curls slow, and nobody's rushing you out. 4.5 stars across 154 reviews. That's not luck. Pull up a seat, order a bowl, and let the evening do its thing. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Shisha smoke, low lights, good music. Shisha Bar Phu Quoc earns that 4.5 rating fast. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Be here tonight.

instagram.caption: Some Phu Quoc nights just need slow smoke and good vibes. Shisha Bar Phu Quoc delivers. 4.5★, 154 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Low lights. Shisha curling. Zero rush. Shisha Bar Phu Quoc hits the spot every time.

$15-30 a head. Worth every dong.

facebook.caption: 4.4 stars. 86 reviews. And this beach bar is sitting right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Mojito Beach Bar delivers cold drinks, sand underfoot, and zero pretension. The kind of place you show up for one round and stay for three. Phu Quoc has plenty of tourist traps. This one earns its rating. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption:
Tourists walk past the InterContinental lobby. Smart travelers take the elevator up.

INK 360 Rooftop Bar sits above the Phu Quoc Marina complex with a panoramic view most visitors never see. 4.5 stars across 542 reviews. Budget $40-80 per person and order slowly.

Sunset here hits different when you're above the treeline, not standing on a crowded beach.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Elevator doors open. The South China Sea fills the frame. This is INK 360 Rooftop Bar inside the InterContinental Phu Quoc. 4.5 stars. Most guests never make it up here. You should.

items.placeName: Sip & Heal Beach Bar Phu Quoc

facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Sip & Heal Beach Bar on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is exactly what it sounds like. Cocktails. Ocean air. Zero hustle. 4.6 stars from 55 reviews and it still feels like your own private corner of Phu Quoc. Show up, order a drink, do nothing. That's the whole plan. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Cocktail in hand, feet in the sand, nobody telling you to move. Sip & Heal Beach Bar delivers exactly that. 4.6 stars. Come see why.

instagram.caption: This place fixes burnout. Sip & Heal Beach Bar, Phu Quoc. 4.6★, cocktails, zero hustle. Save this for your trip.
instagram.video_caption: Cocktails. Ocean air. No agenda. Sip & Heal Beach Bar is the reset you came to Phu Quoc for.

facebook.caption:
941 reviews. 4.4 stars. On Đường Trần Hưng Đạo.

The Rabbit Hole Irish Bar is the kind of place you walk in for one drink and leave three hours later. Cold pints, live sport on the screens, and a crowd that actually has a good time.

If you want something that isn't beach bars and smoothie bowls, this is your spot in Phú Quốc.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
